Robbery146_x264: A person wearing dark clothing stands near seated passengers before moving toward the center aisle. As they move forward, another individual in a gray jacket begins to rise from their seat. The person in dark clothing then leans down and appears to interact with the person rising, possibly engaging in a struggle or confrontation. Other passengers nearby react by shifting positions or leaning closer, some appearing to intervene or observe closely. The person in the gray jacket eventually falls backward onto the floor while still being engaged with the standing individual. The standing person continues to lean over them, maintaining close physical contact as others around them adjust their posture or reach out. The situation remains tense and dynamic, with movement concentrated around the central area where the two individuals are interacting.
Assault042_x264: A person riding a bicycle approaches another individual standing near a parked vehicle. The rider appears to make contact with the standing person, causing both to fall to the ground. After the fall, the rider remains lying on the pavement while the other person stands nearby for several moments before moving closer to check on them. A few bystanders approach the scene, and emergency responders arrive shortly afterward, gathering around the fallen individuals. The person who fell gets up after some time, while the cyclist stays on the ground until assistance arrives. The surrounding area shows minimal activity, with vehicles passing by in the background.
Arson041_x264: A person wearing light-colored clothing stands near a doorway for several minutes, appearing to interact with something at the door. They then turn away and walk out of view. After some time, the same individual returns into the frame, carrying a white object. The person bends down and places the object on the floor near the door, then begins to manipulate it. As they work with the object, liquid spills onto the floor around it. Shortly after, the area becomes obscured by smoke or steam, eventually filling the entire camera view.
yt_arson: Two men are walking along a paved path at night. One man, wearing a black shirt and shorts, stops beside the path and appears to ignite something on the ground next to him, producing bright sparks. He then steps back slightly while holding his hand out toward the ignited object. The other man, dressed in a white t-shirt, continues walking away down the path without stopping. Shortly after, the man in the black shirt turns around and begins running away from the area where he lit the object. The fire quickly grows larger and brighter, illuminating the surrounding foliage before fading into darkness.
